final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with parallel load capability. The shift register has a clock input, a parallel load enable input, and a 4-bit data input. When the load enable is high, the data input should be loaded into the shift register. When the load enable is low, the shift register should shift its contents to the left on each clock rising edge. The most significant bit (MSB) should be set to 0 during the shifting process.
module shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire load,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Load data
        end else begin
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[3:1]}; // Shift right and set LSB to 0
        end
    end
endmodule
